summerCareTips.title: Stay Hydrated
summerCareTips.description: Drink at least 8–10 glasses of water every day to stay hydrated and maintain your body's energy during hot summer weather.

summerCareTips.title: Apply Sunscreen Daily
summerCareTips.description: Use a broad-spectrum sunscreen with SPF 30 or higher before going outside to protect your skin from harmful UV rays.

summerCareTips.title: Wear Sunglasses Outdoors
summerCareTips.description: Choose UV-protection sunglasses to reduce eye strain and protect your eyes from strong sunlight.

summerCareTips.title: Eat Fresh Fruits
summerCareTips.description: Include water-rich fruits like watermelon, oranges, and cucumbers in your daily diet to stay refreshed.

summerCareTips.title: Wear Lightweight Cotton Clothes
summerCareTips.description: Light-colored cotton clothing helps your body stay cool and comfortable by allowing better airflow.

summerCareTips.title: Keep Your Skin Moisturized
summerCareTips.description: Apply a lightweight moisturizer after washing your face to keep your skin soft, healthy, and hydrated.
